title: Alderaan Refugees

|release date=After [[104 ABY]]<ref name="Date">"[[Celestia Galactica Photografica]]" was included in ''[[Star Wars Legends Epic Collection: Legacy Vol. 4]]'', which describes the stories it contains as taking place more than a [[Standard century/Legends|century]] after the events of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. That film took place in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] according to ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'', meaning that all [[Painting/Legends|paintings]] in "Celestia Galactica Photografica," including ''Alderaan Refugees'', must have been created after [[104 ABY]].</ref>
|media type=[[Painting/Legends|Painting]]<ref name="CGP">{{StoryCite|story=Celestia Galactica Photografica|book=Star Wars: Visionaries}}</ref>
|pages=
|published in=
|genre=

'''''Alderaan Refugees''''' was a [[Painting/Legends|painting]]<ref name="CGP" /> created after [[104 ABY]]<ref name="Date" /> that depicted [[Refugee/Legends|refugee]] [[Starship/Legends|vessels]] docked near a valley<ref name="CGP" /> on<ref name="Preview">{{SWArchive|url=eu/lit/comics/news20050315.html|text=Inside ''Star Wars: Visionaries''}}</ref> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The ships in the painting included a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], two [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]], and a [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]]. The ships were stationed on a [[Grass/Legends|grassy]] area next to the valley, with [[pine tree]]s growing throughout along with [[Color/Legends|red]] and blue tents set up between the ships. In the foreground of the painting, a group of [[Human/Legends|Humans]] gathered around a fire pit on top of a ship. The background of the painting included a [[Water/Legends|snowy]] [[Mountain/Legends|mountain range]] behind an Alderaanian [[City/Legends|city]].<ref name="CGP" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|A series of full page paintings capture the amazing vistas around the galaxy, including a battle on Mygeeto, refugees on Alderaan, an immense Jedi museum and much more.|A preview description of "Celestia Galactica Photografica"|<ref name="Preview" />}}
''Alderaan Refugees'' was created for "[[Celestia Galactica Photografica]]," a collection of [[in-universe]] illustrations by [[Ryan Church]] included in the graphic novel anthology ''[[Star Wars: Visionaries]]''.<ref name="CGP" /> The painting was first mentioned in a preview for ''Visionaries'' published on [[StarWars.com]] on [[March 15]], [[2005]], prior to the graphic novel's release on [[April 2]], 2005.<ref name="Preview" />
